meta.title: Abada · Legal infrastructure for venture capital
meta.description: The platform that prepares Colombian companies to raise capital, with attorney review by Balam Legal.

hero.title: The legal infrastructure of venture capital in Colombia.
hero.subtitle: Abada connects founders, investors, and attorneys on one platform. We prepare companies to raise capital and give funds a legal risk assessment ready for decision-making.

platform.title: From first document to investment decision
platform.subtitle: Shared accounts, payments, documents, and audit trails. Every legally significant output is reviewed and signed off by a Balam Legal attorney.

founderCard.title: Investment readiness
founderCard.description: A guided flow that takes a founder from a blank page to the document set an investor expects before writing a check.

investorCard.title: Due diligence for funds
investorCard.description: The target company uploads documents to a data room, Balam Legal reviews them, and the investor receives an assessment organized by where risk sits.

difference.title: Investors see where risk lives
difference.subtitle: We organize every assessment around a Colombian legal risk taxonomy. Funds understand the situation in seconds.

why.title: Built for the ecosystem, not a formality

fast.title: Fast and guided
fast.description: Founders move step by step, with firm defaults and plain-language explanations.

validated.title: Attorney-validated
validated.description: Every legally significant document is reviewed and signed by a Balam Legal attorney.

secure.title: Secure generation
secure.description: Server-side generation, watermarks, and tiered access. Knowledge doesn't leak.

cta.title: Ready to see inside the platform
cta.subtitle: Use the tabs at the top to explore founder, investor, and attorney views.

landing.footer: Abada · Legal infrastructure for Colombian venture capital

founder.generateIntro: Choose a document to start the guided flow with AI assistance.

investor.executiveSummaryText: Ownership is clean, but two issues should be resolved before close: founder vesting not implemented and IP assignment pending from two contractors.

attorney.templatesPlaceholder: Balam Legal template library — coming soon.

dashboard.title: Review queue
dashboard.subtitle: Every legally significant output passes through here before reaching the founder or investor.

review.title: Review · {company}
review.subtitle: Due diligence assessment for {investor}. Assign a risk level to each category and sign.
review.auditNote: Server-side generation. Your signature is recorded in the audit log.

ai.title: Abada Assistant
ai.disclaimer: The assistant guides you, but every legally significant document is reviewed by a Balam Legal attorney.
ai.error: We couldn't process your question. Please try again.
ai.greeting: Hi, I'm the Abada assistant. How can I help with your investment readiness?
